title: Otrai Devathai Lyrics Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Otrai Devathai
Singer(s): Karthik
Movie: Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham
Music: Siddharth Vipin
Lyricist: Madhan Karky

Mannengum sendru thaedi paaru
vinnengum aeri thaedi paaru
ottrai dhevadhai yaaradaa
sattre ivalai paarada. (2)

Ival paarvai minsaaram
ival vaarthai reengaaram
idhal virikkum, ival sirippum
un vazhvin varam. (2)

Sudithaarin thottathukkul
ottrai thaavani.
Tamil mattum pesum
indha thattai paaru nee.

azhagigal pookkum ulagathile
ottrai dhevadhai yaaradaa
sattre ivalai paarada.

Ival paarvai minsaaram
ival vaarthai reengaaram
idhal virikkum, ival sirippum
un vazhvin varam. (2)

Thanpol ulla thoorigal onril
vannam aezhum theettiduvaal.
Nenjil konda aasaigal ellaam
kaagitham meley kaattiduvaal.

Nilam neer thee vaan kaattrai ellaam
viral aindhaale kootti vandhaal.

Ival kai korthu
indha boomi nee paarthaal
un vazhvil vannam pookkum.

Ival paarvai minsaaram
ival vaarthai reengaaram
idhal virikkum, ival sirippum
un vazhvin varam. (2)

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Otrai Devathai, the protagonist expresses his admiration and affection towards a beloved, highlighting the beauty of love and connection. The song's upbeat and romantic vibe perfectly complements the light-hearted moments in Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham. It conveys emotions of joy and celebration, making it a perfect fit for occasions like birthdays and parties. The catchy melody and engaging lyrics create a memorable experience for listeners, evoking feelings of happiness and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Otrai Devathai from Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham is a delightful melody that captures the essence of love and joy. With Karthik's enchanting vocals and Siddharth Vipin's vibrant composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the world of romance and celebration with this captivating track!
stanzaMeanings: Look around the earth and the sky, who is this divine being? Don't miss seeing her.
Her gaze is like a light, her words are like a melody, this will blossom, her smile is a blessing for your life.
In the garden of the one who is sweet, there is a unique flower. Only Tamil speaks in this place, look at it.
Even if she comes alone, she is the beauty of the world.
In this world where beautiful flowers bloom, who is this divine being? Don't miss seeing her.
Her gaze is like a light, her words are like a melody, this will blossom, her smile is a blessing for your life.
If you have a desire in your heart, it will be shown on paper.
If the earth, water, fire, and wind all come together, they will unite as one.
If she holds this earth in her hands, your life will blossom with color.
Her gaze is like a light, her words are like a melody, this will blossom, her smile is a blessing for your life.
